name: SOUTH PLAINS FINANCIAL, INC.
summary: Part I General South Plains Financial, Inc. (the Company or SPFI) is a bank holding company headquartered in Lubbock, Texas, and City Bank, SPFIs wholly-owned banking subsidiary, is one of the largest independent banks in West Texas (City Bank or the Bank). The Company is hereafter collectively referred to as we, us or our. We have additional banking operations in the Dallas, El Paso, Greater Houston, the Permian Basin, and College Station, Texas markets, and the Ruidoso, New Mexico market. Thro...
